textByHash.f1ec5b9858eef0f9299ea4920d6c131fbf1bc5e1: Excuse me. You can't go in there.
textByHash.9fc6a331225d39e2561331916a843453a14aa62f: Who am I? Why, how impertinent! I am a princess and I will be spoken to like one. Now be off with you. I have no time for scruffy adventurers like yourself!
textByHash.5d55f13634a878cfe78388c01f8fb09b1b5e7118: I'm pretty sure I don't want that.
textByHash.637f1b15c5dd50158606a27e2c21c7eaabff0834: Hey, what's that noise over there? Is someone there? Who's near my tower?
textByHash.c76db274dd2a60b698d66edfe5ac1ff773d92c91: Hey, what's that noise over there? Is someone there?
textByHash.8a172788f84da8389f8bbc2e9fcedf04899fa172: You there! Young scrub! Was that you making all that noise back there? Well? Speak up now.
textByHash.9b442fa047a9269d6411847fba7bd1e24f054c42: Well I distinctly heard voices at least! In any case, keep away from my tower.
textByHash.9af86720e9a296fac58c0a75386285cbea091093: I am a princess. I don't have to be nice.
textByHash.d3cdf18425034c6542ba638a9c3c087c35c0a466: Ha! This isn't a fairytale, you know. This is rea...well, it's life!
textByHash.5ca711010836b1ac9836d59235315d23d0fc9b1b: Yes, and stay away from my dwar...uh...tower!
textByHash.b777a8711ab3d01ac3dfeb67d04e3be952571450: Yes? Please make it quick, I am waiting for someone.
textByHash.7f4681770d28a60a89cc32c13d738fab1a0260d7: You think so? Ha! Although you'd most likely remember if you had met this person. If you must know, I am waiting for a relative of mine to arrive.
textByHash.19ddf512281caf861a68ca3eaff512880836d9d6: You are a nosy young person! Well, if you must know, he's in there because I have caught him for someone.
textByHash.a30b59e06c2871828ccb8aaf569af0854fec4638: I am not at liberty to say. In any case, this dwarf was caught spying and snooping and that sort of thing is not taken lightly.
textByHash.66728410ae41105db265bfd7d1544f4213394f59: No, I don't think so. I will be nicely rewarded for catching him.
textByHash.db31de5297f4ce3302c24a1859de3a680842d6b2: Hmm, well as you asked nicely. Ok then.
textByHash.374dca9820524e3422330aea1b7dd8180156d2a7: No! Now please leave. You're annoying me!
textByHash.08b63dc1b9444058b61805c6f7133219aae7bb1e: Ah! What nice manners. It's so hard to find decently mannered young people these days. My name is Princess Miazrqa.
textByHash.47e93280cfdc772d1016acf7b9bf0b86bf8b348b: My birth certificate. Now. how can I be of help?
textByHash.c29370d912ef770d11fea224bd4bae847f97c705: Yes, that's right. I'm waiting for him to be collected by someone.
textByHash.68467ce4d5ca22456262606eaa7ef57f9aba802e: No. You shouldn't guess answers like that. It's not very becoming. She is my second-cousin, twice removed and she is also a very powerful witch who could turn you into something nasty!
textByHash.f0c42bef169eaa1a4ec24ab5776714115c09b396: Now as I was saying, my second-cousin, twice-removed is coming to collect the dwarf. She will find out why he's been snooping around. She has most...persuasive methods.
textByHash.9c51f162909ec4d69cd53b81be082f35957d81f8: Ha! That won't matter to my cousin. She values her privacy above all else, you see.
textByHash.6c184e00b138ff6e10ac52369e3bf6c2b701a29c: Hmmm...well I suppose there is something you can do for me that might make me change my mind.
textByHash.bf7e553c45c1eb39ef12825e23ba9fbffc6b403e: I was at my second-cousin's house just the other day when I suddenly dropped a very valuable pendant that I was wearing. The chain must have broken, you see.
textByHash.8069d14999a9e3906df02df08fc8519bfe6f5123: Well, no sooner had it touched the ground when all of a sudden a mouse ran out from a hole in the wall. It took my pendant in its teeth and disappeared back inside its hole.
textByHash.a293890d5ac883e153bc346530114f5fb946818b: As I'm sure you will believe, I was most upset as the pendant was a gift from my mother. I simply must get it back somehow.
textByHash.f04cf75d27327918c3ad2e356529330ae5a0c7ae: Oh, yes please! It means so much to me. If you are able to find the pendant for me, I will let your dwarf friend go.
textByHash.cdbb18919ef8564514e86b62bcae20e6b6325b8a: It's not far to the west of here, in Taverley village. It has a beautiful long garden - you can't miss it!
textByHash.7011ecaeba998f06521b2aa37c00331d96c4c748: That was you? Oh, my cousin was absolutely furious when she found out about that! She went on about it for ages and even made her hair turn a quite ghastly green colour!
textByHash.4c6dc5b0a4bb06d5cf5cd6ea4a9b19089d901ca6: Well I suggest you be extra careful when you look for my pendant then.
textByHash.a1b614fbcb11ff46dd5f087bd6bf5b45d5bbf3f5: Only to me really. It's not worth much and isn't magical, but it has a lot of sentimental value. It was my mother's pendant. She gave it to me on my tenth birthday.
textByHash.fe9ae7dd6f5f9a4e9f965fca5e38c82009e5d274: I am the daughter of a great and powerful king. In a land far, far away.
textByHash.627c17f5103022e22cdab9d2115ca1c7c47a953f: Well...yes. I suppose, but that doesn't mean it's not far, far away from somewhere else.
textByHash.418a080e8056a6a74f84a5e4bf3ba81763e51885: I am the great niece of King Vallance himself.
textByHash.8fb8b0ad367ea3388d5fa3df4decd0c04182cb79: Yes, it is, isn't it? Now was there anything else?
textByHash.09e059f644c9d80e141dddec00e9c93ce139ee6e: Of course. You may have one of my spare keys.
textByHash.7e28ab6e83846f1e5a1c4508b06e6da2ffc886ea: Don't be silly. You have one already in your bag. Goodness me, how ever will you find my pendant with a memory like that?
textByHash.96e10967422e626325ee2c54060016f6bc3e9681: Very well. Good luck with finding my pendant.
textByHash.2af967dce37b88410614aeff726ba1240c18c55c: Why, yes! That was a very clever guess indeed! She's actually a very powerful witch. Now allow me to reward you in some way as I am feeling generous.
textByHash.4757ca5ba962eab07c54a3aa55e46df7ff9d3b14: As I said, my cousin is a witch but she is also a lover of music. She has a lovely gramophone and she keeps a piano in her basement - why? I have no idea - but you may find it interesting to examine.
textByHash.7169bb1ac44931f8dbc0bfb2f223078b86577362: I don't really know. I know my cousin goes on about that piano a lot, but I've played on it many times and I can't figure out why she likes it so much.
textByHash.03bd258b14e94ff1c143adc594b802b8c5bf610c: I see. How ghastly. Let me continue.
textByHash.30a610521a9e63e179017c19e1d9cc10d1f18463: If you must, but you are wasting time.
textByHash.9d6b4a237278cba4869cfc5f116b9acb80d4491d: Oh, how wonderful! I'm so grateful.
textByHash.4e59c937b05f1271345d7936fefed725dbfec022: Oh yes. Those are her little darlings. I shudder to think what she might do if something were to happen to any of them.
textByHash.3e4603001136fb6a1964acd7bd149ac8fc97318c: Oh yes. Why, only last month one of them got out for a wander and some horrid farmer attacked it with his ear!
textByHash.6b6aa881c59cb67c44500fc74d5ca9003d229bd6: Indeed! Tried to choke the poor thing with it. Anyway, my cousin went into a frightful rage and turned that wretched farmer into one of his own chickens. We had a lovely roast meal that day. Happy memories...
textByHash.244d4d3bb99b6be8b7b4396d6b41bae9bc4f8e97: Oh dear, I hope you're not coming down with something.
textByHash.405aceefd866ee8029ee7bf40517d38bdbe5be06: Now, can I have the pendant please?
textByHash.ef6e3c359f2ad20bffc4b25a09b0711caaf4fb55: Of course. The pendant means more to me than anything.
textByHash.a14ac8d9a048a24c9197f0a197902457a5a3c7d5: Really? You know, I have always wondered. She's ever so secretive and never tells me anything. I was hoping she might tell me when I saw her next.
textByHash.248068aacc0e97ebaeb69c63f7d58324c3fcb55f: What?! Never! That's absolutely awful! How could she? Oh, that's just so...so...mean!
textByHash.ff3ebdd7a1328e90c012f91c1f710d0040cd7a2b: It's quite hard to believe. Do you have any proof?
textByHash.1eae23f725d4064e9f1a888fc5da1f71f7a33bfa: How horrid! Well, when I see her I will tell her exactly what I think. Thank you for telling me all this.
textByHash.ce4fb6b3714a1ed4bd1159125fc920b651d1675c: Really? You may tell him that I will help him in any way I can.
textByHash.ae68a285880d3bc213b24a14174f2410cd7fd1b5: Thanks again for finding my pendant. I felt so lost without it.
textByHash.4b55bc5e9ac1155f38f40b37f0d608fda53ec10d: Oh, hello there. I'm afraid I don't have time to talk right now. I'm rather busy. Come back some other time please.
textByHash.9b5621e3dab09841e2e2237d464295be1e97b6d6: I do believe that is none of your business, young scallyrumpit! Now kindly leave.
